Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch build stage base image from Ubuntu with manual JDK/Maven installation to a pre-configured Maven image.
Dockerfile.before:
FROM ubuntu:latest AS build
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y openjdk-21-jdk maven && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change build strategy from copying pre-built artifacts to building the application inside the container using Maven.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY pom.xml .
COPY src ./src
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update runtime stage base image from AdoptOpenJDK Alpine JRE to OpenJDK Slim JDK.
Simplify artifact copying by referencing the specific JAR file instead of the entire target directory.
Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT for the application startup command.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target levels remain at 17 while using JDK 21 features or toolchain.
Build plugins relying on this property (e.g., Spring Boot) may fail to configure correctly or use outdated defaults for JDK 21.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Comment out the setter methods for user, password, cluster, database, and collection fields.
Comment out the getter methods for user, password, cluster, database, and collection fields.
Initialize the MangoDBConnection field at declaration to ensure it is not null when used.
Replace hardcoded layout padding with the default size constant for better responsiveness.
Update the base URL for the job order status confirmation link to the new Render deployment.
Uncomment the main method to allow the form to be launched directly.
Remove unused MongoClient field and its associated shutdown hook logic.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.before: private final MongoClient mongoClient; ... private void closeMongoClient() { ... }

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Simplify constructor by removing unused parameter and hardcoding connection details directly.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.before: public MangoDBConnection(JOVar config) throws IOException, Exception { ... }

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Inline MongoClient creation into constructor instead of storing it in a field.
Hardcode MongoDB connection string and credentials directly in the source code.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.before: String connectionString = String.format("mongodb+srv://%s:%s@%s...", user, cluster.toLowerCase(), password, cluster);

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Remove commented-out code blocks related to configuration and encryption.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.before: //        SecretKey key = config.getKey(); ... //        String password = AESUtil.decrypt(...)

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Comment out the entire UserConfirm class definition.
